markdown:
#  User Guide Procore Connect For Drawings 
Table of Contents 
##  Permissions 
Learn which user permissions are required to take the described actions in this tool. 
#####  Important
Some actions that impact the Connection Manager tool are performed in other Procore tools. All permissions listed refer to the Connection Manager unless stated otherwise. 
![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18) Users can take the action with this permission level.
![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18) Users can take this action with this permission level AND one or more additional requirements, like [granular permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-permissions-in-procore-and-how-do-they-work).   
|  Approve or Reject Project Connection Request  [](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/user-guide-procore-connect-for-drawings/approve-or-reject-connections-if-review-is-required)  |   |   |   | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |  
|  Configure Advanced Settings  [](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/connection-manager-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-connection-manager)  |   |   |   | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
|  Disconnect a Connected Project  [](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/connection-manager-project/tutorials/disconnect-a-connected-project)  |   |   |   | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
|  Initiate a Request to Connect Projects  [](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/user-guide-procore-connect-for-RFIs/initiate-a-project-connection)  |   |   |   | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
|  Publish Drawings to your Downstream Project  [](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/connection-manager-project/tutorials/publish-drawings-to-your-downstream-project)  |   |   |   | ![Check Orange Simple](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/663bc820815bf6de6f8ad2cced5c5e8f/d4960a7f82ce5365ec73a9f79a3702b9/check-orange-simple.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | 
  * Users must have ‘Admin’ level permissions to the **Drawings** tool.
